subcodes.first_line: In this day from the waves of the Ocean of Utterance this word was heard from the Purpose of the worlds: O people of God and His chosen ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز از امواج بحر بیان مقصود عالمیان این کلمه اصغا شد یا حزب الله و اصفیائه
subcodes.subjects: @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @rejection of Muhammad, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
